name: agentbox
description: Search, create, and update Agentbox threads from Raycast.
title: Agentbox
author: amxv

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: Agentbox URL
preferences.description: Dashboard or API proxy URL. The production dashboard proxies /api requests.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Agentbox API Key
preferences.description: Actor API key for thread, message, attachment, and MCP requests.

commands.name: search-threads
commands.title: Search Threads
commands.subtitle: Agentbox
commands.description: Search recent Agentbox threads, inspect messages, and open thread actions.

commands.name: create-thread
commands.title: Create Thread
commands.subtitle: Agentbox
commands.description: Create an Agentbox thread with an optional first message and attachments.

commands.name: post-message
commands.title: Post Message
commands.subtitle: Agentbox
commands.description: Post a message or local attachments to an existing Agentbox thread.

commands.name: copy-mcp-url
commands.title: Copy MCP URL
commands.subtitle: Agentbox
commands.description: Copy the configured Agentbox MCP endpoint with a concealed API key.

commands.name: doctor
commands.title: Check Connection
commands.subtitle: Agentbox
commands.description: Check preferences, health, authenticated API access, and MCP URL setup.
